title: Food allergies and gluten-related disorders - Canada.ca
content:
## Food allergies and gluten-related disorders
Food allergies, sensitivities and gluten-related disorders, labelling information and how to avoid an allergic reaction to food.

## Services and information
Recognize the risks and symptoms of food allergies and how to avoid an allergic reaction.

### Common food allergens
Identification of common food allergens through labelling and research.

### Avoiding allergens and gluten in food
Information about allergens and gluten on ingredient labels and how to avoid these substances in food.

### Gluten-related disorders
Information about celiac disease and wheat allergy, the two most well-known gluten-related disorders.

### Food allergies and intolerances
Food allergies, celiac disease and Health Canada's food allergen research program
- Canadian Food Inspection Agency
